Home / Products / Earth Pit Chambers & Chamber Covers
Earth Pit Chambers & Covers

Earth Pit Chambers & Chamber Covers

Square Earth Pit Chambers are robust enclosures used to safely house and protect earth electrodes and connections. Made from high-strength polypropylene (PP), they ensure easy access for inspection and maintenance while providing long-term durability in all weather conditions.

Request Quotation View Specifications
Specifications

Technical specifications

All chamber & cover types

</div>

<h3 style="font-size:18px;margin-bottom:16px;">Square Earth Pit Chambers (PP)</h3>
<div class="table-wrap"><table class="specs"><caption style="font-family:Space Grotesk,sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:#fff;background:var(--blue-deep);padding:10px;text-align:left;">Square Earth Pit Chamber</caption><thead><tr><th>Length</th><th>Width</th><th>Height</th><th>Material</th><th>Load Capacity</th><th>Standard</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>245 mm</td><td>245 mm</td><td>195 mm</td><td>PP</td><td>2 Tons</td><td>IEC 62561:5</td></tr><tr><td>310 mm</td><td>310 mm</td><td>225 mm</td><td>PP</td><td>3 Tons</td><td>IEC 62561:5</td></tr><tr><td>310 mm</td><td>310 mm</td><td>225 mm</td><td>PP</td><td>5 Tons</td><td>IEC 62561:5</td></tr><tr><td>500 mm</td><td>500 mm</td><td>315 mm</td><td>PP</td><td>5 Tons</td><td>IEC 62561:5</td></tr></tbody></table></div>

<h3 style="font-size:18px;margin:32px 0 16px;">Chamber Covers</h3>
<div class="grid cols-2" style="gap:24px;">
  <div class="table-wrap"><table class="specs"><caption style="font-family:Space Grotesk,sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:#fff;background:var(--blue-deep);padding:10px;text-align:left;">FRP Cover</caption><tbody><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Length</td><td>300 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Width</td><td>300 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Material</td><td>FRP</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Load Capacity</td><td>3 & 5 Tons</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
  <div class="table-wrap"><table class="specs"><caption style="font-family:Space Grotesk,sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:#fff;background:var(--blue-deep);padding:10px;text-align:left;">Concrete Cover (300×300)</caption><tbody><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Length</td><td>300 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Width</td><td>300 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Height</td><td>170 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Material</td><td>Concrete</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Load Capacity</td><td>5 Tons</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Standard</td><td>IEC 62561:5</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
  <div class="table-wrap"><table class="specs"><caption style="font-family:Space Grotesk,sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:#fff;background:var(--blue-deep);padding:10px;text-align:left;">Concrete Cover (450×450)</caption><tbody><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Length</td><td>450 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Width</td><td>450 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Height</td><td>400 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Material</td><td>Concrete</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Load Capacity</td><td>10 & 20 Tons</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Standard</td><td>IEC 62561:5</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
  <div class="table-wrap"><table class="specs"><caption style="font-family:Space Grotesk,sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:#fff;background:var(--blue-deep);padding:10px;text-align:left;">MS & CI Cover</caption><tbody><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Length</td><td>300 / 450 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Width</td><td>300 / 450 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Material</td><td>MS & CI</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Load Capacity</td><td>5 & 10 Tons</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
  <div class="table-wrap"><table class="specs"><caption style="font-family:Space Grotesk,sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:#fff;background:var(--blue-deep);padding:10px;text-align:left;">PP Round Earth Pit Chamber Cover</caption><tbody><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Top Diameter</td><td>175 / 245 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Height</td><td>240 / 265 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Bottom Diameter</td><td>250 / 330 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Material</td><td>PP</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Load Capacity</td><td>3 Tons</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Standard</td><td>IEC 62561:5</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
</div>

Need a custom specification or bulk quote?

Our engineering team responds within 24 hours with a detailed quotation.
